reference: authors' Replication_files (SyntheticControlMethods Synth, pen='auto', seed 123, n_optim=100)
note: mlsynth's canonical config is backend='outcome-only' (deterministic convex simplex fit); the authors' penalized+covariate Synth is a different implementation, so the agreement is close (corr ~0.75-0.92, ATT within ~15%), not value-for-value. Reproducible numbers pinned; paper synthetic series shipped for the correlation check.
